results.definition_en: A record of money taken in and paid out by a person or a business.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 帳戶、帳目；金錢進出的紀錄。
results.example_en: Please put it on my account.
results.example_zh_tw: 請記在我的帳上。

results.definition_en: Something that is done; or a part of a play.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 動作、行為；表演的一幕。
results.example_en: Her last act was to send a letter home.
results.example_zh_tw: 她最後做的事是寄一封信回家。

results.definition_en: The act of joining one thing to another, so making more.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 加上、添加；附加之物。
results.example_en: In addition to milk, she put sugar in her tea.
results.example_zh_tw: 除了牛奶，她還在茶裡加了糖。

results.definition_en: A small change to make a thing fit better or work right.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 調整、調節；小幅的修正。
results.example_en: I need to make a small adjustment to my watch.
results.example_zh_tw: 我要稍微調整一下我的手錶。

results.definition_en: A printed or pictured notice that gets people to take an interest in something to buy.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 廣告；用以宣傳、招攬注意的訊息。
results.example_en: The advertisement said the shop was open all day.
results.example_zh_tw: 廣告上說這家店全天營業。

results.definition_en: A condition where two or more persons say yes to the same thing.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 同意、協議；達成一致的看法。
results.example_en: We came to an agreement on the price.
results.example_zh_tw: 我們在價錢上達成了協議。

results.definition_en: The mix of gases all about us, that we take in to be living.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 空氣；環繞我們、供呼吸的氣體。
results.example_en: Let some fresh air into the room.
results.example_zh_tw: 讓一點新鮮空氣進房間。

results.definition_en: How much there is of a thing.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 數量、總量；某事物的多寡。
results.example_en: We need a small amount of salt.
results.example_zh_tw: 我們需要一點點鹽。

results.definition_en: The feeling of being made happy by something fun.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 娛樂、樂趣；因有趣事物而感到的開心。
results.example_en: She watched the dog with amusement.
results.example_zh_tw: 她饒富興味地看著那隻狗。

results.definition_en: A living thing that is not a plant or person, like a dog or bird.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 動物；非植物、非人類的生物。
results.example_en: The cat is my favourite animal.
results.example_zh_tw: 貓是我最喜歡的動物。

results.definition_en: Words said back to a question; or the right end to a problem.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 回答、答覆；問題的解答。
results.example_en: I do not know the answer to your question.
results.example_zh_tw: 我不知道你問題的答案。

results.definition_en: A set of parts put together to do a special work.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 器具、儀器；為特定用途組合的器材。
results.example_en: The new apparatus is in the science room.
results.example_zh_tw: 新的儀器放在自然科教室。

results.definition_en: The act of saying that one thinks well of a thing.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 認可、贊同；表示肯定的態度。
results.example_en: She gave a nod of approval.
results.example_zh_tw: 她點頭表示同意。

results.definition_en: A talk where two or more persons do not say the same thing.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 爭論、辯論；意見不同的對話。
results.example_en: They had a long argument about the price.
results.example_zh_tw: 他們為了價錢爭論了很久。

results.definition_en: The making of beautiful things, such as pictures or music.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 藝術；創作美的事物，如繪畫或音樂。
results.example_en: She is good at the art of writing.
results.example_zh_tw: 她在寫作這門藝術上很有功夫。

results.definition_en: A violent act done to hurt or take a thing.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 攻擊、襲擊；以暴力傷害或奪取。
results.example_en: The dog made an attack on the bird.
results.example_zh_tw: 那隻狗攻擊了那隻鳥。

results.definition_en: An act of trying to do something.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 嘗試、試圖；試著去做。
results.example_en: She made an attempt to open the door.
results.example_zh_tw: 她試著去打開那扇門。

results.definition_en: The act of taking note of a thing; keeping one's mind on it.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 注意、留心；專注於某事。
results.example_en: Please give me your attention for a minute.
results.example_zh_tw: 請聽我說一下。

results.definition_en: The power that makes a thing pull others to it.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 吸引力、吸引；使其他事物靠近的力量。
results.example_en: The new shop is a great attraction in town.
results.example_zh_tw: 那家新店是鎮上的一大亮點。

results.definition_en: The right or power to say what others must do.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 權威、權力；管轄或下令的權利。
results.example_en: The police have authority over the town.
results.example_zh_tw: 警察對這個鎮有管轄權。

results.definition_en: The part behind, opposite to the front.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 背部、後方；與正面相對。
results.example_en: Put the box at the back of the room.
results.example_zh_tw: 把箱子放在房間後面。

results.definition_en: The state of being even on both sides, so a thing does not fall.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 平衡；兩側相當而不傾倒的狀態。
results.example_en: He has good balance when he runs.
results.example_zh_tw: 他跑步時平衡很好。

results.definition_en: The lowest part of a thing, on which it stands.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 基底、底部；事物所立的最下端。
results.example_en: The base of the lamp is made of metal.
results.example_zh_tw: 燈的底座是金屬做的。

results.definition_en: The way a person or animal acts.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 行為、舉止；行事的方式。
results.example_en: Her behaviour at the meeting was very kind.
results.example_zh_tw: 她在會議上的舉止非常和善。

results.definition_en: What a person thinks is true.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 信念、相信；認為某事為真。
results.example_en: It is my belief that hard work pays.
results.example_zh_tw: 我相信努力會有回報。
